title: Common People
why_this_song: Common People by Pulp (1995) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "common" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "common" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "people" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "people" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: She studied sculpture at Saint Martin's College
She just smiled and held my hand
How it feels to live your life

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Because there's nothing else to do, ow
Whilst you can only wonder why

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Pulp one question about "Common People", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Pulp sobre "Common People", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Common People" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Common People" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Common People" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Common People" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Common People" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Common People" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
